{# Header-html sits outside .pf-page; bilingual flag must be set here so Jinja sees it. #} {%- set bilingual = doc.get("zweisprachig") %}
{{ doc.company }}     {{ doc.name }}     {%- if bilingual %}Seite / Page{%- else %}Seite{%- endif %} -   / 
{%- set company = frappe.get_doc("Company", doc.company) %} {%- set bank_list = frappe.get_list("Bank Account", filters={"company": doc.company, "is_company_account": 1}, fields=["name", "iban", "bank", "branch_code"], limit=1) %} {%- set bank = bank_list[0] if bank_list else {} %} {%- set company_addr_list = frappe.get_list("Address", filters={"is_your_company_address": 1}, fields=["name", "address_line1", "pincode", "city"], limit=1) %} {%- set company_addr = company_addr_list[0] if company_addr_list else none %} {# Vorausrechnung: posting_date before service start #} {%- set is_voraus = false %} {%- if doc.get("leistungszeitraum_von") and doc.get("leistungszeitraum_typ") in ["Datumsbereich", "Monat/Jahr"] %} {%- if frappe.utils.getdate(doc.posting_date) < frappe.utils.getdate(doc.leistungszeitraum_von) %} {%- set is_voraus = true %} {%- endif %} {%- endif %} {# Dynamic payment days #} {%- set payment_days = 0 %} {%- if doc.due_date and doc.posting_date %} {%- set d1 = frappe.utils.getdate(doc.posting_date) %} {%- set d2 = frappe.utils.getdate(doc.due_date) %} {%- set payment_days = (d2 - d1).days %} {%- endif %}
{%- if doc.get("absender_im_anschriftenfeld") %}
{{ company.company_name }}{%- if company_addr %} · {{ company_addr.address_line1 }} · {{ company_addr.pincode }} {{ company_addr.city }}{%- endif %}
{%- endif %}

{%- endif %} {{ caddr.pincode }} {{ caddr.city }}
{%- if caddr.country and caddr.country != "Germany" %}{{ caddr.country }}

{%- if caddr.address_line2 %}{{ caddr.address_line2 }}
{%- endif %} {{ caddr.pincode }} {{ caddr.city }}

{%- endif %} {%- if client_email %}{{ client_email }}
{%- endif %} {%- if doc.tax_id %}USt-IdNr.{%- if bilingual %} / VAT ID{%- endif %}: {{ doc.tax_id }}{%- endif %}
{# Leistungszeitraum: render depends on the chosen type. - Monat/Jahr → "April 2026" (bilingual: "April 2026 / April 2026") - Datum → "14.04.2026" - Datumsbereich → "01.04.2026 – 30.04.2026" Month names are localized so the English half of a bilingual Monat/Jahr is not just the German word repeated. #} {%- set german_months = {1:"Januar",2:"Februar",3:"März",4:"April",5:"Mai",6:"Juni",7:"Juli",8:"August",9:"September",10:"Oktober",11:"November",12:"Dezember"} %} {%- set english_months = {1:"January",2:"February",3:"March",4:"April",5:"May",6:"June",7:"July",8:"August",9:"September",10:"October",11:"November",12:"December"} %} {%- set period_text = "" %} {%- set _typ = doc.get("leistungszeitraum_typ") %} {%- set _von = doc.get("leistungszeitraum_von") %} {%- set _bis = doc.get("leistungszeitraum_bis") %} {%- if _typ == "Monat/Jahr" and _von %} {%- set _d = frappe.utils.getdate(_von) %} {%- if bilingual %} {%- set period_text = german_months[_d.month] ~ " " ~ _d.year ~ " / " ~ english_months[_d.month] ~ " " ~ _d.year %} {%- else %} {%- set period_text = german_months[_d.month] ~ " " ~ _d.year %} {%- endif %} {%- elif _typ == "Datum" and _von %} {%- set period_text = frappe.utils.formatdate(_von, "dd.MM.yyyy") %} {%- elif _typ == "Datumsbereich" and _von and _bis %} {%- set period_text = frappe.utils.formatdate(_von, "dd.MM.yyyy") ~ " – " ~ frappe.utils.formatdate(_bis, "dd.MM.yyyy") %} {%- elif doc.get("leistungszeitraum_anzeige") %} {%- set period_text = doc.leistungszeitraum_anzeige %} {%- endif %}
